title: Dual-mode foundation
description: Added same-homepage Website and Portfolio modes while preserving the original tools website content and GitHub Pages structure.

title: Minimal glass gateway
description: Polished the mode selector into a compact premium gateway overlay with CMS-controlled card labels, descriptions and display options.

title: Responsive UX hardening
description: Added mobile menus, responsive breakpoints, overflow protection and safer layout behavior for desktop, tablet and phone screens.

title: CMS, SEO and validation polish
description: Added portfolio timeline, social preview metadata, JSON fallback UI, Pages CMS field upgrades, media workflow guidance and a local validation script.

title: Single-file deployment rollback
description: Restored one CSS file and one JavaScript file while retaining the gateway, responsive navigation, portfolio timeline, SEO and CMS improvements.

title: Deployment safety audit
description: Aligned gateway fallbacks and cache versions, guarded CMS choices, corrected deployment paths, added a PNG social preview and strengthened local validation.

title: Mobile runtime stability
description: Added resilient JSON loading, true critical-content fallbacks, compact CMS failure reporting, Gateway scroll locking, reload-frame preparation and mobile mode-switch safety spacing.

title: Cross-browser layout and transition polish
description: Normalized Gateway positioning across short desktop viewports, removed Firefox programmatic focus outlines, aligned download actions, prevented header navigation overlap and refined same-page mode transitions on phones.
